alkylation reagent: subjected to dithiothreitol reduction, iodoacetamide alkylation
cleavage agent: in-gel trypsin digestion using a standard protocol
fragmentation method: data dependent MS/MS for fragmentation of the 10 most intense multiple charged ions with collision induced dissociation (CID) method
instrument: LC–MS/MS analysis was performed using an LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled with an Eksigent Nanoflex cHiPLC™ system through a nano-electrospray ionization source
